headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Mohawk Industries, Raises Price Target to $109
summary: Barclays  analyst Matthew Bouley   maintains Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $96 to $109.
